category_sources: Official Tailwind CSS docs describe Tailwind CSS as scanning templates for class names and generating CSS; source_facts.description says utility-first CSS framework.
display_name_sources: Official documentation and GitHub repository use "Tailwind CSS".
docs_sources: Official Tailwind CSS site provides a dedicated documentation section at tailwindcss.com/docs.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository tailwindlabs/tailwindcss describes itself as the Tailwind CSS utility-first CSS framework and links to tailwindcss.com.
tags_sources: Official docs describe CSS generation and utility classes; official GitHub topics include css, css-framework, functional-css, utility-classes, and tailwindcss.
